bench_setup.notes: EXTI rising-edge trigger test. PB8 generates 10 rising edges; EXTI9 (connected to PB9 via SYSCFG) detects each edge by polling EXTI_RPR1. On FAIL: error_code bit0=ERR_EXTI_INIT (fewer than 10 edges detected), detail0 = actual edge count. On PASS detail0 starts at 10 and increments each ms.

peripheral_signals.notes: Rising-edge generator, output push-pull. Wire: PB8 → PB9.
EXTI9 input, input floating, PORTB selected via SYSCFG_EXTICR3. Wire: PB8 → PB9.
